description: HOMESERVER Coronatio Rust crown runtime. Rust owns source sync, cargo build, binary install, service profile, coronatio.service standup, and HTTP health proof; this sidecar carries constants only.

managed_files.content:
[Unit]
Description=Coronatio HOMESERVER Rust crown
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
SupplementaryGroups=www-data
StateDirectory=coronatio
Environment=CORONATIO_PORT=3013
Environment=CORONATIO_TAB_ROOT=/var/lib/coronatio/tabs
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/coronatio
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2s
NoNewPrivileges=yes
PrivateTmp=yes
ProtectSystem=strict
ProtectHome=read-only
ReadWritePaths=/var/lib/coronatio /mnt/keyexchange /mnt/ramdisk

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
